---
title: "Jogos Desenvolvidos na Disciplina de Desenvolvimento de Jogos (2024/1)"
date: 2024-10-26 00:00:00 -0000
author: "Filipe Mutz"
categories:
    - Miscelaneous
description: "Traz vídeos dos jogos desenvolvidos na disciplina Desenvolvimento de Jogos em 2024/1"
---

## Jogos Desenvolvidos com Unity

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column}

Henrycky e Igor

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/N8KWfpnt2EQ?si=9b_Cgv6eM_obAawm" title="Henrycky Igor"
frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Karla

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dxbmupLkbZc?si=ImOg2QOKIVgWMaMW" title="Karla"
frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Nilo

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/zXEbo1khQ8c?si=bgZxRRFSBE6b3Br1" title="Nilo" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Mateus Couto

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/JOmxrIXSTh8?si=qAF3t5DvmFviR9sW" title="Mateus Couto" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Lorenzo e Gabriel Paschoal

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/1-Ceb_E7GCk?si=vZoYb9cG4U4ifleT" title="Lorenzo e Gabriel Paschoal" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

João Milli e Rogério Medeiros

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/a3X43NMUnh8?si=D6jvyzWrvwwyP3by" title="João Milli e Rogério Medeiros" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Danilo e Gustavo

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/npJ0YLN3NBw?si=9hrIpYQeQGWyuWnk" title="Danilo e Gustavo" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Antônio e Bruno

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/PsMWn6yo-d0?si=uIhzy9DNyKNpKmrP" title="Antônio e Bruno" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Ângelo

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/DMkjDSuu0YY?si=qoRXQorQ7y4ggYFi" title="Ângelo" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

André e Talles

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/PzZEvexNFI0?si=fVhqolJWt1V3iNJM" title="André e Talles" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Filipe Souza e Christian Litzinger

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/R6Rir4_6SqY?si=ax_fZ7qVoXnOCOcP"
title="Filipe Souza e Christian Litzinger" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

:::

## Jogos Desenvolvidos com Pygame

:::  {.columns}

:::: {.column}

Henrycky e Igor

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/g5YCw6deYjk?si=oX90yLb1TMuGP44Z" title="Henrycky Igor"
frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Karla

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/fBtIopjboZ8?si=OA068iX3R-FFqLxC" title="Karla"
frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Nilo

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/UqwGkeG8nto?si=BXKvTv2lfB8kpzp9" title="Nilo" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Mateus Couto

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/z1drHYP43JY?si=ebfuyycvpvZ-1NEx" title="Mateus Couto" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Lu e Carlos Batisti

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dwIfSHckIG0?si=Wj97Y0T_l9INX32S" title="Lu e Carlos Batisti" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Lorenzo e Gabriel Paschoal

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/j3EStYo2oXo?si=vTx-22EcavLu2fRa" title="Lorenzo e Gabriel Paschoal" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

João Milli e Rogério Medeiros

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Jjlhmicra6Q?si=AgcSUtqsWJto5D8n" title="João Milli e Rogério Medeiros" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Danilo e Gustavo

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/52LCJlbeWoQ?si=YGZXzDuIfs9k6Id1" title="Danilo e Gustavo" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Antônio e Bruno

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/EG3FIjPirnw?si=Bh8Qd4QWWqP8x804" title="Antônio e Bruno" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Ângelo

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/U0dU1Q_Sa-U?si=fKUG6O0YsOJ7EFw_" title="Ângelo" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

André e Talles

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/LxDd1WXOHYw?si=CqtFgbnVv9XT_y2y" title="André e Talles" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Filipe Souza e Christian Litzinger

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/E-1jolPAPtg?si=qxRRYcXk2g_rCCkD"
title="Filipe Souza e Christian Litzinger" frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::: {.column}

Matheus e Lucas

<iframe width="320" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xrgbPqTl_oQ?si=CTtnPbrnmhrM5s6O" title="Matheus e Lucas"
frameborder="0"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

::::

:::
